message:
test: pin shm_open+shm_unlink conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_shm.rs covering 2 functions:
- shm_open create + close + unlink round-trip
- shm_unlink on nonexistent name fails on both
- shm_open O_CREAT|O_EXCL on pre-existing name fails with EEXIST
- DISC-SHM-001 documented: name without leading '/' is POSIX
  implementation-defined; fl rejects (-1), glibc accepts and
  resolves to /dev/shm. Both conformant; logged not failed.

5 tests pass.

Bead: bd-shm1
